creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
lippe       2008-05-17 15:19:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/vchkuser        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Vchkuser is a helper program so qmail-smtpd can accept only true users (or alias) from vpopmail database.
  
  WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/vchkuser
  
  PR:             ports/119939
  Submitted by:   Luiz Otavio O Souza <loos.br@gmail.com>
  Approved by:    araujo (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.910     +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/mail/vchkuser/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/vchkuser/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/mail/vchkuser/pkg-descr (new)
